chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S-28 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For hearing of main case 02-10-2023 Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G-Sindh. ***** None present for the applicant. No intimation has been received. Accordingly, this Crl. Transfer Application is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
